text: Just released a new video on neural networks. The key insight is that backpropagation is just the chain rule applied recursively. Nothing more, nothing less. Understanding this demystifies so much of deep learning.
AGI will be the most important technology humanity ever develops. We need to get the alignment problem right. The stakes couldn't be higher.
Hot take: LLMs are not going to lead to AGI. We need world models, reasoning, and planning. Current architectures are missing fundamental pieces.
Excited to announce our new AI ethics framework at Stanford. Technology must serve humanity, not the other way around. Diversity in AI development is crucial.
Starship flight 8 successful! Next stop: orbital refueling demonstration. Mars, here we come 🚀
New video: Why the Raptor engine is a engineering masterpiece. Thread 🧵 1/12
Atlas can now do parkour! Our latest update includes improved balance algorithms and real-time terrain adaptation. The future of robotics is here.
The hype around humanoid robots is getting out of hand. Yes, they're impressive, but practical deployment in unstructured environments is still years away. Let's be realistic.
The leverage of code and media means one person can now impact billions. This is unprecedented in human history. Use it wisely.
The AI bubble is real, but the technology is not a bubble. Similar to the dot-com era. Winners will emerge, most will fail. Invest accordingly.
The Fake News Media won't report it, but AI regulation is being pushed by people who want to CRUSH American innovation. We need FREE competition, not government control!
BREAKING: New study shows AI models are consuming as much energy as a small city. The environmental cost of the AI boom is becoming impossible to ignore.
Inside the race to build quantum internet: Scientists achieve 50km quantum entanglement record. The future of unhackable communication is closer than you think.
Exclusive: OpenAI is planning a major restructuring that would convert it to a for-profit entity. Board approval expected next month. Sources say valuation could hit $150B.
Fed Chair Powell: AI productivity gains are showing up in economic data, but it's too early to determine long-term impact on inflation and employment.
